/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/example-streaming-chat.dir/streaming_chat/main.cpp.o" -o example-streaming-chat  ../libai-sdk-core.a ../providers/anthropic/libai-sdk-anthropic.a ../libai-sdk-core.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_json.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_container.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libcrypto.dylib
